x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Strategic alignment scores enable Now Assist SPM to recommend portfolio optimization based on organizational priorities.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Define strategic objectives and score projects and demands against them via spm_strategy. Target: 3+ active strategic objectives. Now Assist SPM uses alignment scores for AI portfolio prioritization.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_47f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c07
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Strategic alignment scores enable Now Assist SPM to recommend portfolio optimization based on organizational priorities.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Portfolio Strategic Alignment</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function() {
    var t = new GlideRecord("enterprise_strategy");
    if (!t.isValid()) {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "Required table enterprise_strategy not found", finding: "Enterprise Strategy table is not available. Verify the Strategic Portfolio Management plugin is active." };
    }
    var ga = new GlideAggregate("enterprise_strategy");
    ga.addAggregate("COUNT");
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    var actualValue = count + " enterprise strategic objectives";
    if (count >= 3) {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: count + " enterprise strategic objectives — Now Assist SPM can score portfolio decisions against strategic priorities using AI." };
    } else if (count >= 1) {
        return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + count + " strategic objective(s) defined (target: 3+). Now Assist SPM portfolio alignment recommendations will have a narrow strategic frame." };
    } else {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "No strategic objectives defined. Now Assist SPM requires strategic context for AI portfolio alignment recommendations." };
    }
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>SPM</module><number>CHK0000473</number><order>70</order><remediation_guidance>Define strategic objectives and score projects and demands against them via spm_strategy. Target: 3+ active strategic objectives. Now Assist SPM uses alignment scores for AI portfolio prioritization.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>47f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c07</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Portfolio Strategic Alignment</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_47f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c07</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
